subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! At the threshold of the Sovereign of the unseen and the seen, in this Most Great Dispensation, the praised station is that of steadfastness and constancy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محمود درگاه سلطان غیب و شهود در این کور اعظم مقام محمود ثبوت و رسوخ و
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
